message:
feat(fnp-python): k74v.2 tail — asmatrix/bmat/get_include

Adds the 3 remaining numpy.__all__ 2.4.x items from the k74v.2 P2 list:
asmatrix and bmat (legacy numpy.matrix helpers) plus get_include
(build-system path accessor). get_array_wrap, lookfor, maximum_sctype,
and source are NOT in numpy.__all__ on 2.4.3 (removed in 2.x) so they
stay off the passthrough list per YAGNI.

Combined with 194d7a7 + bb09b7f, closes the k74v.2 bead: all 52 P0/P1
+ 3 P2 function passthroughs listed in the bead are now exported from
fnp_python (or were already present under existing wrappers).
